title: Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai
tagline: Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Mayuranathaswamy Temple, or simply Mayuranathar Temple, is a Hindu temple in the town of Mayiladuthurai (formerly known as Mayavaram or Mayuram) in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Mayuranathaswamy Temple, or simply Mayuranathar Temple, is a Hindu temple in the town of Mayiladuthurai (formerly known as Mayavaram or Mayuram) in Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Lord Mayuranathaswamy, a form of Shiva, and has given its name to the town itself. The main icon is a lingam and the presiding deity is called Mayuranathar because the Hindu goddess Parvathi worshipped Shiva here in the form of a mayura. The temple is considered one of the 275 Paadal Petra Sthalams – Shiva temples that are revered in the early medieval Tevaram poems by Tamil Saivite Nayanars including A

topPlaces.name: Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Tamil Nadu is the southernmost state of India. The tenth largest Indian state by area and the sixth largest by population, it is the home of the Tamils, who speak the Tamil language, the state's official language and the first to be recognised as a classical language in India.

topPlaces.name: Ayansuthamalli
topPlaces.description: Ayansuthamalli is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Palinganatham
topPlaces.description: Palinganatham is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Karaivetti Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: The Karaivetti Bird Sanctuary is a 4.537-square-kilometre (1.752 sq mi) protected area and Ramsar site, located in the Ariyalur District of the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The sanctuary is about 25 kilometres (16 mi) from Thanjavur and about 21 kilometres (13 mi) from Ariyalur.

topPlaces.name: Kallakudi
topPlaces.description: Kallakudi is a panchayat town in Tiruchirappalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Twin Temples, Keezhaiyur
topPlaces.description: The Twin Temples at Keezhaiyur is a 9th-century temple complex built by the Paluvettaraiyar chieftains who were vassals of the Medieval Cholas at Keezhaiyur on the Trichy-Ariyalur highway.

topPlaces.name: Karaiyavetti
topPlaces.description: Karaiyavetti is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Malvoi
topPlaces.description: Malvoi is a village located in the Tiruchirapalli district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is approximately 40 kilometers from the Tiruchirapalli district headquarters.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai?
faq.a: Stays in Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tamil Nadu, Ayansuthamalli, Palinganatham, Karaivetti Bird Sanctuary, Kallakudi.
